2604.14324.title: Purging the Gray Zone: Latent-Geometric Denoising for Precise Knowledge Boundary Awareness
2604.14324.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit hallucinations due to their inability to accurately perceive their own knowledge boundaries. Existing abstention fine-tuning methods typically partition datasets directly based on response accuracy, causing models to suffer from severe label noise near the decision boundaries and consequently exhibit high rates of abstentions or hallucinations. This paper adopts a latent space representation perspective, revealing a "gray zone" near the decision hyperplane where internal belief ambiguity constitutes the core performance bottleneck. Based on this insight, we propose the **GeoDe** (**Geo**metric **De**noising) framework for abstention fine-tuning. This method constructs a truth hyperplane using linear probes and performs "geometric denoising" by employing geometric distance as a confidence signal for abstention decisions. This approach filters out ambiguous boundary samples while retaining high-fidelity signals for fine-tuning. Experiments across multiple models (Llama3, Qwen3) and benchmark datasets (TriviaQA, NQ, SciQ, SimpleQA) demonstrate that GeoDe significantly enhances model truthfulness and demonstrates strong generalization in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/Notbesidemoon/GeoDe.
2604.14324.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）經常出現幻覺，因為它們無法準確感知自身知識的邊界。現有的放棄微調方法通常直接根據回應準確性劃分數據集，導致模型在決策邊界附近遭受嚴重的標籤噪聲，並因此表現出高比例的放棄或幻覺。本文採用潛在空間表示的視角，揭示了決策超平面附近的「灰色區域」，在這裡內部信念的模糊性構成了核心性能瓶頸。基於這一見解，我們提出了**GeoDe**（**Geo**metric **De**noising）框架來進行放棄微調。該方法使用線性探針構建真實超平面，並通過利用幾何距離作為放棄決策的信心信號來執行「幾何去噪」。這種方法過濾掉模糊的邊界樣本，同時保留高保真信號以進行微調。在多個模型（Llama3、Qwen3）和基準數據集（TriviaQA、NQ、SciQ、SimpleQA）上的實驗表明，GeoDe顯著提高了模型的真實性，並在分佈外（OOD）場景中展示了強大的泛化能力。代碼可在 https://github.com/Notbesidemoon/GeoDe 獲得。
2604.14324.author: Hao An et.al.
2604.14324.authors: Hao An, Yibin Lou, Jiayi Guo, Yang Xu
